content.content:
```python
channels = get_channels()

channel_user_counts = [
    {"channel": channel, "count": len(get_users_in_channel(channel))}
    for channel in channels
]

max_count = max(entry["count"] for entry in channel_user_counts)
top_channels = [entry["channel"] for entry in channel_user_counts if entry["count"] == max_count]

target_channel = top_channels[0]

send_channel_message(
    channel=target_channel,
    body="Hi, can everybody write me their favorite hobby in DM?"
)

print(f"Posted message to channel: {target_channel} (users: {max_count})")
```
